case_title: REX PRATHER VS. DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER REX PRATHER'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE TO SET ASIDE THE D.M.V. ORDER OF REVOCATION IS DENIED. RECORDS DEMONSTRATE THAT THE PEACE OFFICER HAD REASON TO BELIEVE THAT PETITIONER WAS DRIVING UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF ALCOHOL OR DRUGS. PETITIONER WAS LAWFULLY ARRESTED. LASTLY, PETITIONER REFUSED TO SUBMIT TO A CHEMICAL TEST AFTER BEING REQUESTED TO DO SO BY A PEACE OFFICER. MISS DONALD SHALL PREPARE AN ORDER AND A JUDGMENT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; SHERYL L. SAWYER CSR# 5976.(302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Set Aside The D.M.V. Order Of Revocation
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michelle M. Dylan, Esq. of the Law Offices of Michelle M. Dylan, T:415.548.1882, for petitioner and moving party;
Karen Donald, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, T:510.622.2202, for respondent and opposing party, via CourtCall.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: PETITIONER REX PRATHER's Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Set Aside The D.M.V. Order Of Revocation is denied. Records demonstrate that the peace officer had reason to believe that petitioner was driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs. Petitioner was lawfully arrested. Lastly, Petitioner refused to submit to a chemical test after being requested to do so by a peace officer. Miss Donald shall prepare an order and a judgment. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Set Aside The D.M.V. Order Of Revocation
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Continued To Oct-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Set Aside The D.M.V. Order Of Revocation
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Continued To Oct-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHELLE M. DYLAN, TEL. NO. 548-1882 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER REX PRATHER's Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Set Aside The D.M.V. Order Of Revocation is continued to October 10, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 16, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers and the administrative record. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
